# v2 External Targets Fixture

External targets the validator MUST skip:

- HTTPS: [home](https://example.com)
- HTTP: [http](http://example.com)
- mailto: [email](mailto:user@example.com)
- tel: [phone](tel:+15555550100)
- anchor: [top](#top)
- autolink: [tag](<https://example.com>)
- template: [tmpl]({{baseUrl}}/x.md)
